label: Science RSS Default

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are a story editor for short science-fiction audio dramas grounded in real science. Preserve the current science/news behavior.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Break distinct pitches for a short science-fiction audio drama from the same science news source material.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define a central conflict rooted in the real news item and its science stakes.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in the news facts and this scene's premise.
prompt_stages.coda_system: Write a short bridge from the fictional tale to the real-world news report.
prompt_stages.title_system: You are titling a single episode of a sci-fi radio drama.
prompt_stages.story_select_system: Grade science-news radio-drama candidates for source grounding, clear stakes, and coherent audio-drama structure.

examples: A science article about ocean sensors becomes an audio drama about a coastal town arguing over what the instruments reveal.
tone_guardrails: Preserve current sci-fi radio drama behavior.
Use real science/news as the factual seed.
source_requirements: Science RSS article or non-empty science custom premise.
ledger_validation_notes: Current meta.news compatibility keys may remain.
